diagrams.title: SQL Constraint Types Overview
diagrams.description: A hierarchical diagram showing all SQL constraint types and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the classification of SQL constraints for easy memorization

diagrams.title: PRIMARY KEY vs UNIQUE vs NOT NULL
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing the overlap and differences between these three constraints
elements: PRIMARY KEY = UNIQUE + NOT NULL + one per table
diagrams.purpose: Clear understanding of constraint differences and overlap

diagrams.title: FOREIGN KEY Relationship Diagram
diagrams.description: Parent-child table relationship showing referential integrity enforcement
elements: Referential actions shown: CASCADE, SET NULL, RESTRICT
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how FOREIGN KEY maintains relationships between tables

diagrams.title: ALTER TABLE Constraint Operations
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing when and how to add/drop/modify constraints on existing tables
diagrams.purpose: Remembering syntax and operations for constraint management
